badDescription: Transported to a surreal landscape, a young girl kills the first person she meets and then teams up with three strangers to kill again.
Billionaire devotes his fortune to cosplay and beating up the mentally ill.
A family takes a seasonal caretaking job at a remote, empty hotel. Dad's writer's block turns homicidal.
Farm boy, old man, and a smuggler go on a road trip to rescue a princess and deliver some stolen blueprints for a giant space laser.
Everyone tries the Ice Bucket Challenge. A lot of them fail.
sceneHint: I'm the king of the world!

badDescription: Local hacker discovers we live in a simulation, wears lots of leather.
Old man creates a petting zoo that goes horribly wrong.
Parents forget their kid, who then subjects two burglars to extreme psychological and physical torture.
A father's journey to find his son, with the help of a mentally challenged woman.
Stockholm Syndrome: The Musical.
A series of naps that get progressively more confusing.
A man with a low IQ inadvertently influences several major historical events while running.
A green recluse is forced to go on a rescue mission with a talking donkey to get squatters off his swamp.
Group spends nine hours returning a piece of jewelry.
Teenager gets bitten by a radioactive spider, starts shooting sticky liquid from his wrists and climbing walls.
plotHint: With great power comes great responsibility

badDescription: A father goes on a space trip to save humanity, ends up behind his daughter's bookshelf.
Insomniac office worker starts an underground boxing club with his imaginary friend.
plotHint: The first rule is you do not talk about it

badDescription: After his father's tragic death, a young prince runs away to eat bugs with a meerkat and a warthog.
Barefoot cop spends his Christmas Eve crawling in ventilation ducts to ruin a heist.
Teenager travels back in time and has to fend off his own mother's romantic advances.
Two hitmen have a very long conversation about foot massages and cheeseburgers, then things get messy.
A small beach town's mayor refuses to close the beach despite a very good reason to.
plotHint: You're gonna need a bigger boat

badDescription: A crime family patriarch hands the reins to his reluctant son, who turns out to be a natural.
A cowboy doll has a jealousy-fueled meltdown over the new space ranger toy.
plotHint: Toys come alive when nobody's looking

badDescription: A stranded alien befriends a lonely kid and really just wants to phone home.
sceneHint: Bicycle flying in front of the moon

badDescription: A queen with ice powers accidentally starts an eternal winter after a meltdown at her own coronation.
plotHint: An act of true love breaks the curse

badDescription: A vigilante in a rubber suit faces off against a chaos-loving clown with no plan and no fingerprints.
A paraplegic marine controls an alien body to infiltrate the natives, then switches sides.
Unemployed scientists start a pest control business, except the pests are ghosts.
A child psychologist helps a boy who sees dead people, with one huge catch.
A commercial spaceship crew picks up a very bad hitchhiker.
plotHint: In space no one can hear you scream

badDescription: A nobody boxer gets one shot at the title and just tries to go the distance.
A killer robot from the future is sent back in time to stop a woman from having her son.
A goody-two-shoes and a greaser fall for each other over summer, then pretend not to know each other at school.
A home-schooled teen infiltrates the most popular clique at school to bring them down from within.
A giant ape is captured from his island home and put on display, and it goes about as well as you'd expect.
plotHint: Beauty and the beast, sort of
